events.text: Own Goal by Yassine Meriah, Tunisia.  Panama 1, Tunisia 0.
Ferjani Sassi (Tunisia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Panama 1, Tunisia 1. Fakhreddine Ben Youssef (Tunisia) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Wahbi Khazri.
Goal!  Panama 1, Tunisia 2. Wahbi Khazri (Tunisia) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Oussama Haddadi.
Anice Badri (Tunisia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ricardo Ávila (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Gabriel Gómez (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ghaylène Chaalali (Tunisia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Luis Tejada (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
